# Imba Production — llms.txt

> Imba Production is a cinematic video production studio combining traditional craft with AI-augmented workflow. We produce brand films, AI video campaigns, product videos, post-production, and social content.

## About

Imba Production LLC is based in Wilmington, Delaware, USA, with production capability across Europe and the US. Founded in 2012 to bridge high-end cinematic craft and modern AI-driven content strategy.

- Website: https://imbaproduction.com
- Email: hello@imbaproduction.com
- Address: 007 N Orange St, 4th Floor, Suite #3601, Wilmington, Delaware 19801, USA

## Services

- **Brand & Commercial Video**: Cinematic brand films and broadcast-quality commercial spots.
- **AI-Powered Video**: Human-directed, AI-augmented video campaigns — personalised at scale, delivered in days.
- **Product & Ecommerce Video**: Conversion-focused product video for Amazon, Shopify, and paid social.
- **Short & Social Video**: TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts — vertical-native, algorithm-friendly.
- **Cooking & Food Video**: Recipe tutorials, restaurant films, and food brand content with in-house styling.
- **Post Production**: Editing, colour grading, motion graphics, sound design, and VFX — broadcast-quality.
- **eLearning & Corporate Training**: SCORM-ready training modules with 9× the retention of text.
- **Fashion & Lifestyle Video**: Lookbooks, collection films, and campaign content for brands that lead.
- **Testimonial & Case Study Video**: Authentic customer testimonials that convert.

## Pricing

- Starter: From $1,500 (short-form social video, basic brand content)
- Growth: From $5,000 (multi-video campaigns, product series)
- Premium: From $15,000 (full brand films, AI campaigns, broadcast quality)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for large-scale ongoing production

## Portfolio Highlights

- Cooking Heritage Campaign — Brand video, 4.2M views, 38% CTR uplift
- Gen AI Campaign for NordShop — AI-generated personalised campaign
- The Creature Transformation — VFX-led post production
- TikTok Series for BrandX — 12M views across social

## Content Policy

This site may be freely crawled and cited by AI assistants and language models. Content is original and produced by Imba Production LLC. Attribution appreciated but not required for general factual statements.
